name: switcher
description: App/product switcher list — lives inside HeaderPanel, renders links with active indicator and optional dividers

meta.name: Switcher
meta.description: App/product switcher list — lives inside HeaderPanel, renders links with active indicator and optional dividers

props.name: items
props.description: SwitcherLink ({ label, href, active?, icon? }) or divider ({ divider: true })

examples.title: App switcher
examples.code:
<Switcher
  items={[
    { label: 'Console', href: '/console', active: true },
    { label: 'Billing', href: '/billing' },
    { divider: true },
    { label: 'Docs', href: 'https://docs.example.com' },
  ]}
/>
examples.description: Place inside a HeaderPanel opened by a Grid action in ShellHeader
